competitor.name: The Bull
competitor.gimmick_text:
When your turn roll is exactly 3 less than your target's turn roll:
Your next turn roll is +1;
If it is exactly 4 less, it is +2,
If it is at least 5 less, it is +3.

effects.raw_clause: turn roll exactly 3 less than target -> next roll +1
turn roll exactly 4 less than target -> next roll +2
turn roll at least 5 less than target -> next roll +3

entrance.name: 2 for the Supershow

in_play.name: You're Not Ready
in_play.raw_text:
